holdings.infoBox: BGIG is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 5.12%, UnitedHealth Group at 4.83%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.22%, The PNC Financial Services Group at 3.89%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.78%.

overview.description: The Bahl & Gaynor Income Growth ETF (BGIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in US large cap companies with a reliable dividend stream. The fund uses a bottom-up approach to select companies that are perceived to have strong fundamentals BGIG was launched on Sep 15, 2023 and is issued by Bahl & Gaynor.
